tagline: Cross-device sync — now built into the YouCoded app.
longDescription:
Cross-device sync used to be a standalone skill but is now built directly into the YouCoded app — no plugin to install. Open the app, go to Settings → Sync, and pick one of the built-in backends (Google Drive via rclone, GitHub via a private repo, or iCloud via the native folder). The app handles upload/download/conflict resolution automatically on every session start and end.

If you're using Claude Code standalone without the YouCoded app and need sync, the legacy skill lived inside `youcoded-core` before being folded into the app; that repo is being deprecated. Use the app for the best experience.
